title: avenochloa pratensis subsp. hirtifolia
intro: Avenochloa pratensis subsp. hirtifolia, also known as Hairy Oat-grass, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the genus Avenochloa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Hairy Oat-grass is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in dried or powdered form for medicinal purposes.
